problem id: ce862776
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01111000 -> 11011100
  10111100 -> 10101110
  10101000 -> 11110100
  10111000 -> 10111100
  00000011 -> 00001101
  11011111 -> 00010011
  01000110 -> 00111011
  11100111 -> 11101111
  10011011 -> 00100001
  11011100 -> 00011110

query: 10000000
predicted answer: 01000000
